welcome.headline: Welcome to Froshiar
welcome.tagline: Manage your business smarter, faster, and easier.

slide1.title: Manage Your Business With Ease
slide1.description: Manage your entire business from one place.
slide1.closing: All with a simple and easy-to-use experience.

slide2.title: Your Own Online Store
slide2.description: Create your own online store in minutes.

items.shareLink: Share your store link with customers

slide3.title: Advanced Reports & Insights
slide3.description: Monitor your business performance with professional reports.
slide3.closing: Make smarter business decisions with real data.

slide5.title: Built For Every Business
slide5.description: Froshiar is designed for more than 10 business types including:

slide6.title: Works Everywhere
slide6.closing1: Fast, simple, and optimized for everyday business operations.
slide6.closing2: Whether you are in your store, warehouse, office, or on the move, your business is always with you.

final.title: Ready To Grow Your Business?
final.description: Start managing inventory, sales, purchases, reports, invoices, and your online store with Froshiar today.

login.title: Welcome to Froshiar

onlineStore.title: Online Store
onlineStore.lockedPitch: Create your own online product catalog and showcase your products on the internet.
onlineStore.subscriptionRequired: This feature requires an active Online Store Subscription.
onlineStore.legacyNotice: Your store was already active before this update — contact support to keep it running.

onlineStoreInfoModal.title: Online Store
onlineStoreInfoModal.description: Create your own online product catalog and showcase your products on the internet.
onlineStoreInfoModal.bullet4: Display your address and phone number.
onlineStoreInfoModal.bullet6: Share your unique store link with customers.
onlineStoreInfoModal.bullet7: Allow customers to browse your products from any device.
onlineStoreInfoModal.footerNote: This feature requires an active Online Store Subscription.

support.description: For custom websites, business systems, mobile applications, e-commerce platforms, and software solutions, contact us:

purchases.title: Purchases
purchases.categoryPlaceholder: e.g. Mobile, Clothes, Computer, Home Appliance
purchases.websiteDescriptionPlaceholder: Short description shown on your online store
purchases.websiteDescriptionHint: Optional. Shown only on your online store, not in the app.
purchases.deleteConfirmMsg: This will remove the purchase from your records. It can only be done if none of its stock has been sold and no debt is owed on it.
purchases.cannotDeleteHasSales: This purchase has recorded sales and cannot be deleted. The stock is still linked to completed sales records.
purchases.cannotDeleteHasDebt: This purchase still has an unpaid supplier debt and cannot be deleted. Settle the debt first.
purchases.noHistoryDetail: Record your first purchase to see history here
purchases.validationBuyPrice: Purchase price must be greater than 0.
purchases.validationIdType: Please select an ID type (Shared or Custom).
purchases.idExhausted: Could not generate a unique ID. Please enter one manually.
purchases.validationAmountPaid: Amount paid cannot exceed the total purchase amount.
purchases.dateLockedNote: Recorded at purchase — cannot be edited
purchases.buyPriceLockedNote: Recorded from supplier — cannot be edited
purchases.quantityLockedNote: Change only via a new Purchase, Sale, or Return

sales.title: Sales
sales.startNewSaleSub: Add products, set prices, generate invoice
sales.checkPriceSub: Look up product prices and stock
sales.addProductsFirst: Add at least one product to complete the sale.
sales.noInventoryMsg: Add products in the Inventory module first
sales.noHistoryDetail: Start your first sale to see history here

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.noInventoryDetail: Add your first purchase to populate inventory
inventory.noResultsSub: Try adjusting your search or filters
inventory.onlineStoreVisibleSub: Published products appear on your public storefront

bulkSync.title: Online Store Bulk Sync
bulkSync.masterToggleLabel: Enable Online Store For All Products
bulkSync.masterToggleSub: Publish every product automatically — new products too
bulkSync.confirmPublishMsg: This will publish all {{count}} products to your Online Store.
bulkSync.confirmRemoveMsg: This will remove all products from your Online Store. Your local inventory will not be affected.
bulkSync.note: When enabled, every product — including ones you create later — is automatically published to your Online Store. When disabled, all products are removed from the storefront, but stay in your local inventory.
bulkSync.perProductNote: You can still publish or hide individual products from each product's page.

inventory.deleteMsg: Remove "{{name}}" from inventory? This cannot be undone.
inventory.noSales: No sales recorded for this product yet.
inventory.websiteDescriptionPlaceholder: Short description shown on your online store
inventory.websiteDescriptionHint: Optional. Shown only on your online store, not in the app.
inventory.buyPriceLockedNote: Set when purchased — cannot be edited
inventory.quantityLockedNote: Change only via Purchase, Sale, or Return
inventory.cameraPermDenied: Camera access denied. Please enable it in your device settings.
inventory.errorSave: Could not save changes. Please try again.
inventory.duplicateItemIdBody: ID '{{id}}' is already used by another product.
inventory.itemLimitReachedBody: You've used {{used}} of {{limit}} items. Upgrade your plan to add more.
inventory.categoryHasProducts: Cannot delete — {{count}} product(s) still use this category.
inventory.deleteCategoryConfirm: Delete '{{name}}' permanently? This cannot be undone.
inventory.duplicateCategory: A category with this name already exists.
inventory.categoryIsDefault: The default category cannot be deleted.
inventory.reportFullSub: Complete product list with all details
inventory.noLowStockProductsDetail: All products have sufficient stock levels
inventory.noOutOfStockProductsDetail: All products currently have stock available
inventory.noRecordsInPeriodDetail: No products match the selected date range

inventoryHistory.title: Inventory History
inventoryHistory.noHistoryDetail: Products that sell out or are removed will appear here
inventoryHistory.permanentDeleteMsg: This will permanently remove '{{name}}' from all records. This cannot be undone.

suppliers.noSuppliersDetail: Suppliers are automatically created when you add a purchase
suppliers.noPurchases: No purchases found for this supplier.

suppliers.hasActiveDebts: Cannot delete — this supplier has active outstanding debts.
suppliers.hasPurchases: Cannot delete — this supplier has existing purchase history.

customers.title: Customers
customers.noCustomersDetail: Customers are automatically created when you complete a sale
customers.noHistory: No sales recorded for this customer yet.
customers.name: Name *
customers.deleteInvoiceMsg: Permanently delete invoice {{invoice}}? Inventory will be restored. This cannot be undone.
customers.deleteAccountMsg: Permanently delete {{name}}'s account? All customer data will be removed. This cannot be undone.
customers.deleteBlockedSales: Cannot delete: this customer still has sales records. Delete all invoices first.
customers.deleteBlockedDebts: Cannot delete: this customer has active outstanding debts.
customers.deleteBlockedSalesHint: Delete all {{count}} invoice(s) first to enable account deletion.
customers.deleteBlockedDebtsHint: Settle all outstanding debts first to enable account deletion.
customers.duplicatePhone: An account with this phone number already exists.
customers.useExisting: Please use the existing account instead of creating a new one.

debt.title: Debt
debt.noSalesDebtsDetail: Debts appear when sales are recorded on credit

upgradeScreen.invalidCode: This license code is not valid. Please check it and try again.

securityScreen.changePinSub: Enter current PIN then set a new one
securityScreen.enterCurrent: Enter your current PIN to continue
securityScreen.mismatch: PINs did not match. Please try again.
securityScreen.pinSetMsg: Your PIN has been saved successfully.

currencyScreen.title: Exchange Rate
currencyScreen.updateSub: Enter the new USD → IQD exchange rate. New purchases will use this rate. Existing invoices are unaffected.
currencyScreen.rateUpdated: Exchange rate set to 100 USD = {{rate}} IQD
currencyScreen.noChange: The rate is already set to that value.
currencyScreen.infoNote: Changing the rate only affects new purchases. All historical invoices permanently preserve the rate that was active when they were created.

dataScreen.title: Data Management
dataScreen.backupDataSub: Export all data to a shareable file
dataScreen.restoreBackupSub: Import data from a backup file
dataScreen.backupSuccessMsg: Your backup file is ready to save or share.
dataScreen.backupErrorMsg: Could not create backup. Please try again.
dataScreen.restoreMsg: Restoring this backup will replace ALL current local data. This cannot be undone.
dataScreen.restoreErrorMsg: Could not restore backup. The file may be corrupted.
dataScreen.restoreInvalidFileMsg: This file is not a valid Froshiar backup.
dataScreen.restoreLimitExceededTitle: Backup Too Large for Your Plan
dataScreen.restoreLimitExceededMsg: This backup contains {{needed}} items, which exceeds your plan's limit of {{limit}}. Upgrade your plan or restore a smaller backup.
dataScreen.restoreLimitUndeterminedMsg: Your subscription plan could not be verified, so this restore was blocked to protect your data. Please try again.
dataScreen.resetAppSub: Delete all local data and start fresh
dataScreen.resetModalMsg:
This will permanently erase ALL app data — inventory, sales, purchases, customers, debts, reports, and settings. The app will return to its initial state.

Type RESET below to confirm.
dataScreen.devBuildMsg: Restoring a backup requires a full Froshiar build. File access is not available in Expo Go.

aboutScreen.title: About
aboutScreen.bexDreDesc1: BexDre is a full-service software and digital solutions company. We design, build, and scale the technology businesses run on — from custom business systems, software architecture, and UI/UX design to complete digital transformation solutions that help organizations manage, automate, and grow.
aboutScreen.bexDreDesc2: Our work spans ERP, POS, inventory, and accounting systems. It also includes web, mobile, and desktop applications, e-commerce platforms, cloud solutions, and API development. Every system we build is engineered for reliability, scalability, and long-term performance.
aboutScreen.bexDreDesc3: Behind every project stands a dedicated UI/UX team, a dedicated social media agency team, a dedicated branding team, a professional design team, and a software engineering team — combining strong technical foundations with thoughtful design to deliver products that are powerful and easy to use.
aboutScreen.bexDreDesc4: Froshiar is one of our flagship products — a complete offline-first business management system built for local markets. It reflects what BexDre stands for: practical, professional technology that helps every business manage, automate, grow, and digitally transform, without complexity or unnecessary cost.

profileScreen.title: Business Profile
profileScreen.logoHint: Tap to change your business logo
profileScreen.saveError: Could not save business profile. Please try again.

pin.forgotMsg: To reset your PIN you must reset the entire app. All data will be deleted.
